title: Magicreatestra
description: just a fun pack for me and my friends :)
body:
Do you want to play create and magic mods or fly to the moon?
Or you want to troll friends or mobs with a spell which launches them in the air?
Here is a modpack,
All mods:

- Ad astra
- Advancement Plaques
- Appleskin
- ars noveau
- Artifacts
- BoccHUD
- Create
- Creeper overhaul
- Curios API
- Deeper and Darker
- Do a barrel roll
- lots of emi mods
- lots of Embeddium mods
- Enchantment descriptions
- exposure
- Fallingtree
- Farmers delight
- Gravestone Mod
- Immersive Armors
- Iron's spells 'n Spellbooks
- Jade
- Legendary Tool tips
- Majrusz accessories
- Majrusz Enchantments
- Dynamic lights for embeddium
- Silent Gear
- Sophisticated backpacks
- sound physics remastered
- travelers backpack 
- xaeros minimap (Fair play for better expirience) and worldmap
- And lots of Yung mods
  

(great expirience with friends)
